title: Yet Another Modpack
description: A modpack made by thinkseal with a bunch of random mods in it.
body:
# Yet Another Modpack Thinkseal's modpack full lots of random mods! ![Works On Fabric](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_64h.png?raw=true) ![Won't Support Forge](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/unsupported/forge_64h.png?raw=true) This modpack contains many progression and QOL mods. It is meant to be a magical steampunk styled modpack. I hope you like it. --- Details

For the recommended experience please use 6GB of RAM or more. **If you are running this on a dedicated serer you need to remove Effective in the 1.19.2 version or the server will crash.** If you find any bugs or have mod suggestions please tell me on discord. ## 🏳️‍🌈-Pridecraft Have you ever thought that your game is too boring and straight? Well, that's no more! Get [Pridepack](https://pridecraft.gay/pridepack) *(or [its variations](https://git.pridecraft.gay))* today!
